title: Humans and agents — executing together.
lede: Every aspect of milestone 2 serves the same vision: people and agents shipping outcomes side by side. Click any aspect to learn more.

aspects.title: Human & Agents collaboration
aspects.oneLiner: Humans and agents share one container, one context, one goal.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] The new shared surface where people and agents work on the same outcome. Group chat lives next to the work. Permissions inherit. Context is shared. Everyone — human or agent — can see what's happening and contribute.
highlights: [Placeholder] One context for the whole team

aspects.title: Ecosystem
aspects.oneLiner: Your agents, our agents, partner agents — all in one platform.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] Bring your own agents (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, MCP partners) into monday, and access monday from your AI tools. A growing library of agents that converge in one workspace.
highlights: [Placeholder] monday available from external AI tools

aspects.title: Workflows
aspects.oneLiner: Agents inside workflows, with control over inputs and outputs.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] Agents live inside the workflows people already use. Granular control over the process, inputs, and outputs — so what gets done is exactly what should get done.

aspects.title: Trust & visibility
aspects.oneLiner: Permissions, visibility, and guardrails — so teams can adopt with confidence.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] Agents inherit user permissions. Visibility lives at both the admin and team level. Boundaries hold. People adopt agents because they trust them.

aspects.title: Context
aspects.oneLiner: Agents that know you, your team, and what you're working on.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] Deep understanding of who you are, your team, and your current work — fed to every agent that needs it. Brings external data in and connects agents into a team.

aspects.title: Sidekick
aspects.oneLiner: A proactive agent that anticipates and produces real work.
aspects.description: [Placeholder] Lives in your container, knows your context, and anticipates what's next. Produces artifacts — HTML, decks, docs — not just chat replies.
